title: The Bad Lord Byron
writer: Paul Holt, Laurence Kitchin, Peter Quennell
actors: Dennis Price, Mai Zetterling, Joan Greenwood
plot: Seriously ill on a military campaign in Greece, Lord Byron dreams of being judged upon his death, as either a poet and soldier or as a seducer and libertine. Amongst the witnesses called are his free-thinking mistress, Lady Caroli...
